tasks.prompt: Suppose you are the head of the student volunteer association at your university. Write a notice of about 100 words to recruit tutors for a free weekend reading program for children of migrant workers. Your notice should state: (1) the purpose of the program; (2) the duties and time commitment of the tutors; (3) the qualities expected of applicants; (4) how and by when to apply. Do not write your own name; sign as Student Volunteer Association.

covers purpose, duties/time, expected qualities, how/when to apply
notice format with title and signature, fairly formal register
